# Exercise images

Screenshots referenced by the step instructions. Learner-facing steps reference these
with relative paths (`../images/<name>.png`). Until real captures are added, the step
files use `<!-- image: ... -->` HTML-comment placeholders so issue comments render cleanly.

## Assets to capture

| File | Step | Shows |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `step1-app-download-page.png` | 1 | GitHub Copilot app download page with platform options |
| `step1-app-download.gif` | 1 | Downloading and installing the GitHub Copilot app |
| `step1-install-signin.png` | 1 | App install / sign-in screen |
| `step1-chat-draft-issue.png` | 1 | Quick chat drafting the bookmarks issue |
| `step1-connected-repo.png` | 1 | Connected repository with quick chat open |
| `step1-issue-created.png` | 1 | Created issue with the title marker |
| `step2-edit-instructions.png` | 2 | Editing copilot-instructions.md in the editor |
| `step2-instructions-diff.png` | 2 | Diff of the committed instructions |
| `step3-bookmarks-ui.png` | 3 | Bookmarks UI: original URL + short slug |
| `step3-pr-opened.png` | 3 | Pull request opened from the session |
| `step3-pr-reference-issue.png` | 3 | PR body referencing the app issue |
| `step4-pr-review.png` | 4 | PR review view in the app |
| `step4-merged-issue-closed.png` | 4 | Merged PR, linked issue closed |
| `step5-canvas-preview.png` | 5 | Browser canvas previewing the app on the public port |
| `step5-canvas-bookmark.png` | 5 | Canvas showing a bookmark and its slug |
